name: @bolusi/db-server
description: Kysely + PostgresDialect, migrations, codegen types, RLS policies, forTenant — the ONLY exported way to query tenant tables (08 §3.2, FR-1039)

scripts.db:codegen: kysely-codegen --dialect postgres --camel-case --out-file src/generated/db.ts --url ${DATABASE_URL:?run this from the repo root via pnpm db:codegen, which derives this worktree own database URL (T-14d). NOTE: no apostrophes in this message — sh parses them and an odd count makes the whole script a syntax error}
scripts.db:codegen:check: kysely-codegen --dialect postgres --camel-case --out-file src/generated/db.ts --url ${DATABASE_URL:?run this from the repo root via pnpm db:codegen:check, which derives this worktree own database URL (T-14d). NOTE: no apostrophes in this message — sh parses them and an odd count makes the whole script a syntax error} --verify
